changes: Reorder system prompt to prioritize content/interaction probing before style
Upgrade premature_finish_guard to block mode when turns remain
Append probing priority strategy to taxonomy skill
evolver_rationale: Content coverage (0.333) and interaction coverage (0.389) are both low while style is perfect (1.0), indicating the agent probes style too early and neglects content/interaction. The system prompt previously prioritized style by turn 2, which caused this imbalance. Reordering to content/interaction-first should redistribute coverage. The premature finish guard is upgraded from warn to block when turns remain, directly addressing the early finish in train_000195. The taxonomy skill append reinforces the probing priority at the skill level.
